name: browser
title: Browser
description: use for known-url browser work, rendered-page extraction, authenticated pages, live UI verification, Interact with docs and JS-heavy pages, screenshots, accessibility snapshots, and browser evidence. use when provided a URL to inspect, test or verify a webpage or UI, needs scraping/fetching from, wants screenshots or truth, or  pages that require clicking, filling, login state, tabs, accordions, or auth. use built-in web search for discovery first, and use browser known-url, use togther.
